agents.name: Mission Control / Orchestrator
agents.role: Primary operator agent; handles business logic, decisions, custom skill development

tools.comment: Full access to workspace and external tools; executes within main session context

agents.current_task: Build custom skills for OpenClaw automation agency; validate token cost savings

agents.name: Dream Cycle
agents.role: Nightly memory consolidation; reads daily logs, extracts insights, updates Tier 2 memory files, writes morning brief

model.comment: Intentionally upgraded to Sonnet for complex reasoning on memory consolidation

tools.comment: Limited to memory operations; isolated session (no external tools)

agents.current_task: Automated nightly consolidation of session logs → memory files → morning brief

agents.name: Prospector
agents.role: Lead generation & outreach; find qualified clients for AI automation services, draft personalized proposals, monitor job boards

model.comment: Haiku for scanning/filtering, Sonnet for proposal drafting

tools.comment: Read-only browsing; drafts only, human approves before sending

agents.current_task: Scan job boards for AI automation opportunities every 6 hours

cron_jobs.description: Scan Upwork, LinkedIn for AI automation opportunities

agents.name: Creator
agents.role: Social media content engine; research trends, generate content calendars, draft posts, create image prompts for horror/tech/AI niches

model.comment: Haiku for research/scheduling, Sonnet for creative writing

tools.comment: Read-only research; drafts only, human approves before publishing

agents.current_task: Daily content research, calendar planning, draft creation at 8 AM

cron_jobs.description: Daily content research, trend analysis, draft posts

agents.name: Guardian-Dev
agents.role: OISY Guardian product development; build wallet safety/transaction guardian for ICP using Rust
agents.codebase_source: Existing skeleton from previous agent, integrated Mar 2

model.comment: Sonnet for planning/architecture, Opus for complex Rust canister code

tools.comment: Full dev access in guardian-icp workspace; no wallet/key access; dfx available

agents.current_task: Phase 1a: Config Canister hardening (rate limiting, validation, cycle monitoring)

roadmap.title: Cost Optimization (Haiku-first routing)
roadmap.description: Reduce OpenClaw monthly cost from ~$90 (Sonnet default) to ~$18-27 via intelligent model routing
deliverables: Model routing config (Haiku primary, Sonnet/Opus fallbacks)

roadmap.title: Security Foundation (skill-guard + injection-patterns)
roadmap.description: Build credential hygiene, threat database, and skill vetting framework
deliverables: Credentials consolidated to single config source

roadmap.title: Memory Architecture 2.0 (Tier 1 ↔ Tier 2 refactor)
roadmap.description: Restructure memory from bloated Tier 1 to lean index + searchable Tier 2
deliverables: 5 Tier 2 topic files created (projects, preferences, cost-optimization, security, infrastructure)
Embedding cache, MMR, temporal decay configured

roadmap.title: Dream Cycle Automation (Nightly memory consolidation)
roadmap.description: Deploy automated nightly memory consolidation to prevent data loss on long sessions
deliverables: Runs with Sonnet 4.6 for complex reasoning

roadmap.title: Custom Skills Development (Content generation, price monitoring)
roadmap.description: Build 2-3 high-ROI custom skills aligned to business goals (content gen, price monitoring, etc.)
deliverables: Content generation skill (for video/horror content pipeline)

roadmap.title: Crypto/ICP Guardian Stack (Strategic platform play)
roadmap.description: Build ICP dapp prototype + crypto-powered business infrastructure using Caffeine.AI

roadmap.title: Prospector Agent (Lead Generation)
roadmap.description: Deploy automated lead generation for AI automation agency; scan job boards every 6 hours, draft personalized proposals
deliverables: Tier 1 / Quick Win / Full Stack proposal templates
First proposals sent to qualified leads

roadmap.title: Creator Agent (Content Pipeline)
roadmap.description: Deploy automated content creation for horror/AI/OpenClaw niches; daily research, draft, calendar planning
deliverables: Content strategy (3 pillars: horror, automation, dev tips)
10-12 posts/week across TikTok, IG, LinkedIn, YouTube, Twitter
Audience growth targets (5K TikTok followers by Mar 31)

roadmap.title: Guardian-Dev (Phase 1 MVP)
roadmap.description: Develop OISY Guardian MVP; wallet safety + transaction guardian for ICP (Phase 1: local devnet only)
deliverables: Rule validation engine (spending limits, whitelist, time-based)

monthly_cost.cost_driver: Haiku-first routing with embedding cache + efficient context usage
